results.rendered_html:
ut-√kṛṣ (ud-√kṛṣ) P. sometimes Ā. -karṣati, -te, to draw or drag or pull up;
to raise;
to draw or take out;
to extract;
to pull or put off,  MāṇḍUp. ;  MBh. ;  Ragh. ;  Suśr. ;  R.  &c.;
to put off, delay,  Nyāyam. ;
to bend (a bow);
to tear asunder:
Caus. -karṣayati, to elevate, raise, increase,  Sāh.  :
Pass. -kṛṣyate, to be lifted or drawn up;
to be raised, rise, become powerful, become eminent,  MBh.  &c. (cf. ut-kṛṣṭa).

results.rendered_html:
utkṛṣ 1 P.
1 To draw or pull up, raise or lift up; udakarṣi  Śi. 13. 60 ; to draw or take out, extract, extricate; aṃgadakoṭilagnaṃ prālaṃbamutkṛṣya  R. 6. 14. 
2 To draw, attract;  Ś. 17. 42. 
3 To pull or put off.
4 To increase, enhance (opp. apakṛṣ).
5 To bend (as a bow).
6 To tear asunder.
— Caus. To elevate, raise, increase.
— pass.
1 To be lifted, raised.
2 To rise, be supreme or eminent.
